mapper.update: update private_conversation set last_message_id = #{msgId}, last_message_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select c.id as conversationId,
case when c.user_min = #{userId} then c.user_max else c.user_min end as targetUserId,
u.nickname, u.avatar,
m.content as lastMessage, c.last_message_time as lastMessageTime,
( select count(*) from private_message pm where pm.conversation_id = c.id and pm.receiver_id = #{userId} and pm.is_read = 0 ) as unreadCount
from private_conversation c join user u on u.id = ( case when c.user_min = #{userId} then c.user_max else c.user_min end )
left join private_message m on m.id = c.last_message_id
where c.user_min = #{userId} or c.user_max = #{userId}
order by c.last_message_time desc
